name: HYSTER-YALE, INC.
business: Hyster-Yale, Inc. is a globally integrated company offering a full line of lift trucks, attachments, parts, fleet management services, technology and energy solutions. It sells primarily to independent Hyster and Yale retail dealerships and through a direct sales program to major customers. Its end-user base includes retail, durable goods, food and beverage, industrial, and logistics industries.

exposures.sentence: The Company intends to expand the use of automation and machine learning in our products, including customer-facing features.

The lift truck industry also competes with alternative methods of materials handling, such as automated warehouses, including conveyor systems and automated guided vehicles and systems as well as suppliers of alternative power sources including lithium-ion and hydrogen power suppliers.

The lift truck industry also competes with alternative methods of materials handling, such as automated warehouses, including conveyor systems and automated guided vehicles and systems as well as suppliers of alternative power sources including lithium-ion and hydrogen power suppliers.

During 2025, the Company announced a strategic business realignment of Nuvera Fuel Cells, LLC ("Nuvera") designed both to increase near-term profits and to create an integrated energy solutions program in the Americas segment, which is part of the HYMH business.
The Company also utilizes artificial intelligence tools to analyze, design and enhance the efficiency and innovation of its product development process.

The Company may be unable to protect its information systems against service interruptions, data corruption, cybersecurity incidents or network breaches, which have in the past and could in the future disrupt business strategy and operations and could materially adversely affect the Company's results of operations, financial condition or reputation.

catalysts.event: Strategic realignment of Nuvera Fuel Cells
catalysts.sentence: During 2025, the Company announced a strategic business realignment of Nuvera Fuel Cells, LLC ("Nuvera") designed both to increase near-term profits and to create an integrated energy solutions program in the Americas segment, which is part of the HYMH business.
the Company launched a restructuring program in Q4 2025, including targeted annualized cost reductions of $40 $45 million beginning in 2026.

catalysts.event: Expected trough of the current cycle
catalysts.sentence: Management expects Q1 2026 to represent the trough of the current cycle, reflecting the impact of lower booking levels earlier in 2025.

catalysts.event: Tariff mitigation benefits begin to increase
catalysts.sentence: The benefits of these actions are expected to increase beginning in Q2 2026 as the full effect of measures implemented during 2025 are realized.
